id: sso-controller-json-web-key-set
title: "Get JWKS"
description: "Returns the JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) containing the public keys used for verifying access tokens."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get JWKS"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/sso/jwks/{clientId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the JSON Web Key Set (JWKS) containing the public keys used for verifying access tokens.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
